title: polemonium elusum
intro: Polemonium elusum, also known as the "Rocky Mountain Sky Pilot," is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, and is believed to have a soothing effect on the skin and mucous membranes. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. The herbal preparations of Polemonium elusum can be found in tinctures, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions and wounds.
